QueryExtension.Constraint: ( ( ${param.code} IS NULL OR PD.DETAIL_CODE LIKE UPPER(${param.code}) ) AND ( ${param.group} IS NULL OR PD.PER_GROUP = UPPER(${param.group}) ) AND ( ${param.category} IS NULL OR PD.PER_CATEGORY = UPPER(${param.category}) ) AND ( ${param.multiples} IS NULL OR PD.ALLOW_MULTIPLES = UPPER(${param.multiples}) ) AND ( ${param.order} IS NULL OR PD.ORDER_NUMBER LIKE UPPER(${param.order}) ) AND ( ${param.prompt} IS NULL OR PD.PROMPT LIKE (${param.prompt}) ) )

Security.roles: viewOnly medium high wcSuper scSuper bmsSuper aeSuper dmSuper cpSuper edsAdmin ccbcMan ccbcUser ccbcSGB2 ccbcTape admin
